anglophone.title: German broadcaster removes TV intro after Elon Musk takes legal action

anglophone.title: In Albania, anger grows against the government for supporting a Kushner-linked luxury resort

anglophone.title: Live with a partner? You may be sharing more microbes than you think

anglophone.title: Tehran selling deal with US as victory – but for Iranians it was necessity

anglophone.title: The war with Iran is making oil changes pricier. And a deal won't solve it
